---
name: Starter adaptation question
about: Ask how to adapt the contract, schema, or example flow to a different workflow
title: "[Adaptation] "
labels: question
assignees: ""
---

Check the root README and `docs/integration-guide.md` first if you have not already.

## What You Are Trying To Build

Describe the workflow or app contract you want to adapt this starter to.

## Raw Input Or Output Shape

Share the request or response shape you need to support.

## Expected Stable Contract

Describe the normalized or app-facing result your code should end up with.

## Where You Think The Change Belongs

- schemas
- input builder
- request adapter
- response adapter
- normalizer
- app-facing envelope
- eval handoff
- demo app

## Current Blocker

Describe the part that is unclear or not fitting your workflow.

## Failure Modes To Preserve

List any malformed-output, missing-fields, unsupported-status, retry, or fallback cases that still need to behave deterministically.
